name: Is voice search optimization different from regular SEO for lawyers?
description: Yes. Voice search focuses more on natural speech, short answers, local intent, and structured data than standard SEO alone.

mainEntity.name: Is voice search optimization different from regular SEO for lawyers?

acceptedAnswer.text: Compared with general SEO, voice search optimization puts more weight on conversational phrasing, quick answers, local details, and structured data. Compared with traditional content writing, it is more focused on what people say out loud, not just what they type.
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes. Voice search focuses more on natural speech, short answers, local intent, and structured data than standard SEO alone.
